canonical_source.role: Helper in C-RSP authority row 5 (not canonical template authority).

purpose: Portable onboarding instructions for satellite agents while preserving TLC authority boundaries.

startup_checklist.action: Read C-RSP authority map before any contract work.
Load agent helper prompt for execution guardrails.

non_overwrite_rule.description: Portable onboarding content must not redefine or supersede TLC canonical paths.
forbidden: Declaring portable kit files as canonical sources for constitutional or C-RSP template authority.
Overriding authority order defined in projects/c-rsp/CANONICAL_ROLE_MAP.md.

expected_outputs: Agent identifies canonical truth surfaces before execution.
Agent can distinguish helper prompts from canonical contract authority.
Agent reports V&T claims against canonical files, not portable mirrors.
